notes: Retry model confirmed working (all 20 runs used 3 retries = 60 total). T1 win rates pass GDD floor for all chassis. Gate fails solely on wins_gte2: 0/20 runs reached terminal_state=win. BRAWLER is the worst-performing chassis (avg 0.83 battles_won, 12 of 20 runs). SCOUT performing strongest (avg 4.2 battles_won). Likely cause: difficulty ramp or enemy scaling preventing any run from reaching full completion (15 battles). Needs investigation.
